chunks.title: Prophecy Against Judah and Babylon
chunks.reason: Jeremiah delivers a unified speech detailing the history of prophetic warnings, the coming judgment via Nebuchadnezzar, and the seventy-year timeline.

chunks.title: The Cup of Wrath
chunks.reason: A symbolic vision where Jeremiah drinks from the cup of wrath and is commanded to make all nations drink it.

chunks.title: The Great Storm of Judgment
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle describing the universal scope of Yahweh's judgment against all nations and shepherds.
